title: Flame Axe
description: A powerful axe that deals 9 damage, sets enemies on fire, and summons lightning on the nearest player with a 30-second cooldown.
body:
# Flame Axe
- Flame axe can deal damage with lighting strike, when lighting strike hits the player player is set on fire.
- Axe deals 9 damage but can be enchanted only in ANVIL!!!
- RPM to shot the nearest player within 30 blocks with lighting strike
- Fire axe has 30seconds cooldown.
- check changelog for diffrent language ( versions have diffrent languages )
# ![Fame Axe third person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7c5f664cb83e8523ca8e05891278c5b32fab6e8.png)
